message:
style(btree,connection,pager): fix indentation alignment and test robustness

Formatting pass across the new append-hint code paths:
- Collapse multi-line function call arguments that fit on one line
  (store_rightmost_leaf_cache_from_page, ok_or_else, as_mut)
- Realign if-let chain branches in the rowid resolution ladder
  (connection.rs) to restore consistent 8-space indentation
- Break long condition expressions at the comparison operator
  (pager.rs page_plane_visible_commit_seq equality check) and
  wrap wait_for_sequence_change calls to the method-chain style
- Fix test_table_try_append_cached_rightmost_leaf_hint test to
  track the actual highest rowid inserted via inserted_through
  instead of hardcoding the loop upper bound, making the assertion
  correct even when the loop exits early due to a page split

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
